name: rolepod
description: Turn Claude Code into a coordinated software-house team. 18 specialist agents (backend, frontend, QA, security, billing, performance, design, docs, ops, etc.) work in parallel by domain ownership. Pre-commit gates fire automatically — S1-S5 simplicity, T1-T6 testing, F1-F5 failure-mode — to catch bugs before they ship. A 6-phase lifecycle (Define → Plan → Build → Verify → Review → Ship) orchestrates big features through /team-* slash commands. Includes 42 skills (TDD, debugging, code review, security audit, performance, frontend UI, content writing, etc.) and 7 rules (3 always-on + 4 path-scoped). Universal — works in any repo, no project-specific config required.
